implementation_summary: Added a shared dependency-free TPS privacy policy/helper in __init__.py.
Applied policy to outbound status snapshots and debug logs while preserving raw internal session lookup state.
Added secret-safe observability contract privacy metadata and README migration guidance.
Added focused tests for disabled compatibility, deterministic pseudonyms, no-leak outbound behavior, secret safety, per-field treatments, and unchanged TPS counters.

verification_commands.command: python3 smoke check for get_observability_contract JSON serialization, privacy metadata, disabled raw compatibility, enabled deterministic pseudonym, and secret non-disclosure

verification_commands.evidence: Completed; returned label/dependency suggestions only, no blocker for this implementation.

requirements_met.requirement: Single shared redaction policy/helper governs identifier fields including session_id, model, provider, and configured future identifier-like fields.
requirements_met.evidence: _PrivacyPolicy, _redact_identifier, _redact_payload, get_privacy_diagnostics; tests/test_privacy.py covers session_id/model/provider and tenant_id via HERMES_TPS_PRIVACY_FIELDS.

requirements_met.requirement: Disabled/default-compatible mode preserves existing public behavior.
requirements_met.evidence: Existing tests/test_api.py and tests/test_hook.py pass; test_disabled_mode_returns_raw_identifiers_by_default covers helper compatibility.

requirements_met.requirement: Enabled mode does not emit raw covered identifiers on available outbound surfaces.
requirements_met.evidence: test_enabled_snapshot_and_logs_do_not_emit_raw_identifiers checks status snapshot and debug logs; contract tests check no raw sample identifiers or secret material.

requirements_met.requirement: Deterministic pseudonyms are stable, distinct, and non-raw.

requirements_met.evidence: get_privacy_diagnostics and contract expose only secret_configured/secret_material_exposed; test_contract_and_diagnostics_describe_privacy_without_secret verifies configured salt is absent.

requirements_met.requirement: Hook-path overhead remains bounded and dependency-free.
requirements_met.evidence: Implementation uses only standard library hmac/hashlib/os and per-payload field traversal; no packages, network calls, workers, or session scans added.

requirements_met.requirement: Contract/docs state active privacy mode and per-field treatment without over-promising unavailable surfaces.
requirements_met.evidence: get_observability_contract()["privacy"] added; README Privacy Redaction added; tests assert REST/WebSocket/Prometheus availability remains false.
tests/test_hook.py and tests/test_api.py pass; privacy no-leak test verifies raw get_tps_stats lookup still returns expected counters.
